infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SnapDone uses your camera to capture receipts, flyers, notes, and other documents to turn them into actions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SnapDone accesses your photo library to process screenshots, photos, and documents into actions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SnapDone uses your microphone to capture voice notes and turn them into reminders and tasks.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: SnapDone creates reminders from your captured documents and voice notes.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: SnapDone adds events from flyers, appointment cards, and travel confirmations to your calendar.
